reply.text: I need to speak with whoever approved this level of confidence

messages.text: im simply requesting a meeting with upper management immediately
Upper management is busy being hot in mirrors
That is exactly why this is an urgent matter actually
Bold to think you get meetings off one DM
im prepared to submit a full presentation on why I deserve one
Presentation better be stronger than that caption energy
You are trying, still not landing
im just respecting the main character budget no need for extras
Main character does not hide behind flower phone cases
That phone case is clearly a security system for innocent bystanders
Please im the threat here not them
Cute pitch try again with a real plan
Friday night drinks you pick the spot I bring the sarcasm
